news.title:
SEBI's new MF guidelines aim to reduce overlaps and enhance product differentiation.
Changes include lifecycle funds, rationalised sectoral exposure, and co-existing value and contra funds.
news.summary:
SEBI's new MF guidelines aim to reduce overlaps and enhance product differentiation.
Changes include lifecycle funds, rationalised sectoral exposure, and co-existing value and contra funds.

news.title:
India's top 100 unlisted firms are valued at ₹28.5 lakh crore, surpassing Finland's GDP.
They generated ₹8.9 lakh crore revenue in 2025 vs ₹6.7 lakh crore in 2023, showing a 15% CAGR.
news.summary:
India's top 100 unlisted firms are valued at ₹28.5 lakh crore, surpassing Finland's GDP.
They generated ₹8.9 lakh crore revenue in 2025 vs ₹6.7 lakh crore in 2023, showing a 15% CAGR.

news.title:
Gold loans see a 90% surge, driving India's retail credit boom per CRIF High Mark report.
Indians increasingly leverage gold for financing, moving beyond traditional storage.
news.summary:
Gold loans see a 90% surge, driving India's retail credit boom per CRIF High Mark report.
Indians increasingly leverage gold for financing, moving beyond traditional storage.

news.title:
JM Financial AIF launches a ₹1,500 crore pre-IPO category II AIF, entering pre-IPO investment.
The fund targets firms likely to list in 18 months, leveraging equity capital markets expertise.
news.summary:
JM Financial AIF launches a ₹1,500 crore pre-IPO category II AIF, entering pre-IPO investment.

news.title:
JM Financial reports resilient Q3FY26 earnings for largecaps, with smallcaps showing highest misses.
The review highlights a growing divergence in earnings across market capitalisation buckets.
news.summary:

news.summary: JM Financial notes difficulty in predicting RBI's rule change impact on volumes.

news.title:
JM Financial anticipates a decline in F&O volumes due to prop trading restrictions.
Retail participation is expected to remain steady, according to JM Financial.

news.title:
RBI mandates 100% collateral for broker funding, impacting broking firms like Motilal Oswal, Jio Financial, and Angel One.
New rules effective April 2026 include 50% collateral for exchange guarantees, restricting bank funding for proprietary trading.
news.summary:
RBI mandates 100% collateral for broker funding, impacting broking firms like Motilal Oswal, Jio Financial, and Angel One.
New rules effective April 2026 include 50% collateral for exchange guarantees, restricting bank funding for proprietary trading.

news.title:
JM Financial posts PAT above INR 1,000 crore in 9 months, with 17% QoQ growth.
Fees and commission up 32% YoY; IPO pipeline exceeds INR 1,20,000 crore in next 12-18 months.
news.summary:
JM Financial posts PAT above INR 1,000 crore in 9 months, with 17% QoQ growth.
Fees and commission up 32% YoY; IPO pipeline exceeds INR 1,20,000 crore in next 12-18 months.

news.title:
JM Financial held earnings call on Feb 6, 2026, discussing Q3 and 9M FY26 results.
Audio recording of the call is available on JM Financial's website for investor access.
news.summary:

news.title:
JM Financial's Q3 net profit rose to 3.1B rupees from 2.1B YOY.
Q3 revenue declined to 9.99B rupees from 11.06B YOY.
news.summary:
JM Financial's Q3 net profit rose to 3.1B rupees from 2.1B YOY.
Q3 revenue declined to 9.99B rupees from 11.06B YOY.

news.title:
MOFSL highlights India's benefit from the India-EU FTA, offering preferential access to 97% of tariff lines post-ratification. Key sectors include defence, metals, autos, and IT services.
Indian firms like Jindal Stainless, SAIL, JSW Steel, Tata Tech, LTTS, and KPIT Tech may gain. EU competition could impact domestic sectors, but labour mobility and exports improve.
news.summary:
MOFSL highlights India's benefit from the India-EU FTA, offering preferential access to 97% of tariff lines post-ratification. Key sectors include defence, metals, autos, and IT services.
Indian firms like Jindal Stainless, SAIL, JSW Steel, Tata Tech, LTTS, and KPIT Tech may gain. EU competition could impact domestic sectors, but labour mobility and exports improve.

news.title:
JM Financial Ltd to hold an earnings call on Feb 6, 2026, at 2 PM IST.
The call will discuss Q3 and nine-month financials for Dec 31, 2025. Details on jmfl.com.
news.summary:

Brokerages raise target prices for L&T amid strong demand post-results.
news.summary:

news.title:
M&M Financial Services fell 2.8%, hitting an intraday low of ₹359 on BSE post Q3 results.
At 9:56 AM, M&M Finance traded 2.15% lower at ₹361.65 amid cautious brokerage outlook.
news.summary:

news.title:
Gold prices may stay firm on Fed rate cut hopes, geopolitical risks, and weak dollar, analysts say.
Silver saw a 14% surge on MCX, but analysts expect a correction as it nears USD 100/ounce.
news.summary:

news.title:
Q3 FY26 sees mixed results in power sector; thermal giants like NTPC and Adani Power face declines, while renewable firms like JSW Energy and Suzlon show growth.
BHEL and NHPC report strong PAT growth; Coal India struggles with revenue dip, and Tata Power faces sales decline due to Mundra plant inactivity.
news.summary:
Q3 FY26 sees mixed results in power sector; thermal giants like NTPC and Adani Power face declines, while renewable firms like JSW Energy and Suzlon show growth.
BHEL and NHPC report strong PAT growth; Coal India struggles with revenue dip, and Tata Power faces sales decline due to Mundra plant inactivity.

news.title:
Gold and silver prices may stay firm next week due to geopolitical tensions and US tariff policy uncertainty.
Traders will monitor inflation data, China trade figures, and Federal Reserve commentary closely.
news.summary:
Gold and silver prices may stay firm next week due to geopolitical tensions and US tariff policy uncertainty.

news.title:
JM Financial reiterates 'Buy' on Kalyan Jewellers, citing 42% YoY revenue growth in Q3 FY26, driven by festive demand and 27% SSSG.
Kalyan added 18 net stores in India, 1 in the UK; Candere saw 147% YoY growth with 14 new showrooms in Q3.
news.summary:
JM Financial reiterates 'Buy' on Kalyan Jewellers, citing 42% YoY revenue growth in Q3 FY26, driven by festive demand and 27% SSSG.
Kalyan added 18 net stores in India, 1 in the UK; Candere saw 147% YoY growth with 14 new showrooms in Q3.
